shortDescription: Stylish 2-bedroom semi-detached in South Parkdale blending Victorian charm with contemporary living.
fullDescription: Welcome to 166 Cowan Avenue in the vibrant South Parkdale neighbourhood. This charming semi-detached home seamlessly blends period character with modern comfort. The main living area impresses with nine-foot ceilings, designer fixtures, and a seamless flow between rooms. The kitchen is a chef’s dream with quartz countertops, a large island, and high-end stainless-steel appliances. The 2 bedrooms are well-proportioned, with the primary suite featuring a walk-in closet and updated ensuite. Additional highlights include in-suite laundry, ample storage, and energy-efficient mechanicals. Transit, cycling infrastructure, and the best of Toronto’s cultural scene are right at your doorstep.
keyFeatures: Minutes to parks, shops, and restaurants
Cosy living room with gas fireplace
Renovated galley kitchen with breakfast bar
